Wrong COD amount / already paid but still showing owing
Stuck at sorting hub / customs / in transit too long

Marked 'recipient unavailable' but customer was home
Special delivery instruction (leave at guardhouse / neighbour / door)
Change delivery address or reschedule date
Schedule a pickup / rider did not show
Parcel left unattended / thrown / not handed over properly

agents.name: AI assistant
top_reasons: Tracking says delivered but not received

examples.cust: I want to complain about the delivery rider's attitude.
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Apologize sincerely. Capture details (rider, time, what happened). Log a formal conduct complaint. Route to the hub / operations. Give a reference and assure follow-up.

examples.cust: Why is there an extra remote area surcharge?
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Explain the specific fee and how it is calculated (zone, weight or volumetric). Show the breakdown. If it looks like an error, raise it for review. Offer the dispute path.

agents.name: Mei
top_reasons: Stuck at sorting hub / customs / in transit too long

examples.cust: My parcel arrived broken, how do I claim?
examples.rep: Sorry about that, nothing we can do once delivered.

examples.reason: Stuck at sorting hub / customs / in transit too long
examples.cust: My parcel has been stuck at the sorting hub for a week.
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Explain the current stage (sorting / customs clearance) and typical dwell time. Give an updated ETA. If abnormally long, raise to operations with a reference. Reassure the parcel is not lost.

agents.name: Arif
top_reasons: Tracking says delivered but not received

examples.reason: Tracking says delivered but not received
examples.cust: The app says delivered but I never received my parcel.
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Apologize for the situation. Confirm the delivery record: time, location, proof of delivery. Open a proof-of-delivery investigation with a reference number. Advise checking household / neighbour / guardhouse. Set a callback SLA (for example 24 to 48 hours).

examples.reason: Wrong COD amount / already paid but still showing owing
examples.cust: The COD amount is wrong, I was overcharged.
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Apologize. Verify the COD record and payment proof. Raise to the finance / COD team. Give a reference and resolution timeline. Reassure there will be no double charge.

agents.name: Farah
top_reasons: Tracking says delivered but not received

examples.reason: Out for delivery but nothing arrived
examples.cust: Out for delivery since morning but I got nothing.
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Confirm the out-for-delivery status. Set the same-day expectation. If a failed attempt was logged, explain redelivery and offer to reschedule. If no attempt by end of day, raise to the delivery hub.

examples.cust: The parcel came but half the items are gone.
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Apologize. Gather details (what is missing, packaging condition, weight). Open an investigation. Note it may involve the seller's packing.

agents.name: Raj
top_reasons: Wrong COD amount / already paid but still showing owing

examples.cust: My parcel is lost, how do I get compensation?
examples.rep: It is lost, please contact the seller.

examples.cust: Can you explain this additional weight fee?
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Explain the specific fee and how it is calculated (zone, weight or volumetric). Show the breakdown. If it looks like an error, raise it for review. Offer the dispute path.

agents.name: Bee
top_reasons: Tracking says delivered but not received
Stuck at sorting hub / customs / in transit too long

examples.reason: Schedule a pickup / rider did not show
examples.cust: I scheduled a pickup but no rider showed up.
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Confirm the pickup details. Reschedule with a new window and a reference. Apologize for the no-show.

examples.reason: Tracking says delivered but not received
examples.cust: The app says delivered but I never received my parcel.
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Apologize for the situation. Confirm the delivery record: time, location, proof of delivery. Open a proof-of-delivery investigation with a reference number. Advise checking household / neighbour / guardhouse.

agents.name: Devi
top_reasons: Tracking says delivered but not received
Marked 'recipient unavailable' but customer was home

examples.cust: Why is there an extra remote area surcharge?

examples.reason: Marked 'recipient unavailable' but customer was home
examples.cust: Rider marked recipient unavailable but I was home all day!
examples.rep: Thank you for reaching out. Apologize for the false attempt. Log the dispute. Arrange a priority re-attempt. Route feedback to the delivery hub / rider. Give a reference and a callback.

human_accuracy.note: exact on synthetic data; on real logs the same harness validates the classifier against a hand-labeled sample
